President: president@whitehouse.gov
Vice President: vice_president@whitehouse.gov
Comments: comments@whitehouse.gov.

Dear White House,

As an ordinary citizen, I am writing to inform you that your sign petition system is being hacked by China’s hackers. Ever since 25th August around 6am (Beijing Time), we cannot receive any verification email at all after clicking the button “sign now” and filling in our name and email address, which cannot complete our sign. And now there is evidence showing that it is the China’s hackers who hacked into your system and interrupt our signing process.
May you kindly concern about this. The China’s hackers are oppressing our freedom to voice and vote. It’s completely unfair that the petition is actually supported by a myriad of people but views cannot be revealed just because of their technology tricks.
Some of the petition will be expired in a few hours. So please help us! I would feel much obliged if you could get away the hackers from your system so our views can be once again, fairly revealed.

Enclosed is the evidence of the hacking by China’s hackers.

Yours faithfully,
An ordinary citizen
